notes: v239 — Signals always load now. If a new load arrived while an older signal-preparation run was still winding down, the new run could be silently skipped and every automatic attempt after it suppressed — so streaks, scores and volume averages never appeared for that session. Fixed: a blocked run retries itself the moment the old one releases, the internal flags can no longer stay stuck, and a 25-second watchdog after every load kicks preparation off if nothing has started for any reason. Includes v238's share-list reliability fixes.
